query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_rows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN paid_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_paid_at,
  SUM(CASE WHEN paid_at = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_paid_at,
  SUM(CASE WHEN paid_at IS NOT NULL AND paid_at != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_paid_at,
  MIN(paid_at) as min_paid_at,
  MAX(paid_at) as max_paid_at
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';
